name: HYSA Auto-Save Challenge
disclosure: Moves $20 into high-yield savings every month. Excellent for discipline, rough on short-term flexibility.
strategyNote: Good but costly now. Builds cushion and growth if the student can live with less cash this month.

name: Starter ETF Auto-Invest
disclosure: A beginner investment lane. Long-term upside, but the money is less liquid than a savings account.
strategyNote: Best for students with extra room in wants or strong savings habits already in place.

name: Side Hustle Supply Bundle
disclosure: Supplies can unlock larger job payouts later, but only if the student sticks with the plan.
strategyNote: Classic opportunity cost. Short-term pinch for possible later upside.
